text: In the ./servers/rest-api-server/knex_migrations/seeds folder, look at the 006-india-pincodes-*-seed-en-IN.cjs files. These files contain the pincode details for a region in india. I want you to translate the area, city, district, and state, fields - leaving the remaining fields as they are - into the hi-IN, kn-IN, ml-IN, mr-IN, ta-IN, and te-IN locales. The locale_id field, in each record, should up updated to match the locale of the translation.
Use the ICU transliteration service for now
